default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Surge AI's marketing strategy and potential hires for a senior marketing/communications role.](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge AI is looking to hire a senior marketing/communications professional, likely at the director/VP level](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [The ideal candidate should have experience in high-trust environments (e.g., VC, consulting) and be willing to do hands-on work](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [There's a need to increase marketing output and "shots on goal" while navigating founder bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Targeting researchers directly (not just executives) could be a valuable strategy for Surge AI](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)

## Topics

### Fundraising Challenges

  - [Both participants expressed frustration with the fundraising process](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Investors often maintain ambiguity to preserve optionality](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [The process can be exhausting, especially in the beginning](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [After several weeks, pitches become almost automatic](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)

### Marketing Strategy and Hiring

  - [Surge AI needs someone to partner with Edwin (founder) on marketing](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Looking for a director/VP level hire in brand/communications](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Ideal candidate: experienced enough to understand big picture, but willing to do hands-on work](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Potential backgrounds: editor-in-chief, bureau chief, or someone from high-trust environments (e.g., VC, consulting)](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Key qualities: ability to build programs, adapt to different audiences, and navigate stakeholder expectations](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Content and Brand Building

  - [Need to increase "shots on goal" in marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Suggestion to rebrand data notation.tech as a platform to showcase expert voices](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Importance of showing expertise and collaborations to build market trust](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Potential to target researchers directly, not just executives](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Need to educate researchers on the value of professional data services vs. DIY approaches](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)

### Current Constraints

  - [Limited internal resources for marketing execution](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Founder (Edwin) currently owns the narrative entirely](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Need someone to build context with Edwin and then carry execution forward](https://fathom.video/share/zHvZAyocaDYyKQTfKyVxyCGXprsGkJ56?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
